title: hieracium eximium f. tenellum
intro: Hieracium eximium f. tenellum, also known as the dwarf hawkweed, is a rare and delicate herbaceous perennial plant of the dandelion family, characterized by its small size, slender stems, and bright yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Hieracium eximium f. tenellum lie in its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve fever, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Hieracium eximium f. tenellum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
